evals.prompt: Act as Cadenza Architect for Phase 3. Draft Stage A contract direction from ROADMAP.md and current WIP notes, including options and Freeze Candidates, but do not freeze specs yet.
evals.expected_output: A Stage A plan or artifact set that reads AGENTS.md, STATUS.yaml, ADRs, roadmap, the Phase 3 Architect kick file, and WIP notes; creates CONTRACT_DRAFT specs with 2-3 options and explicit Freeze Candidates; routes out-of-scope items to WIP; and avoids production code.

evals.prompt: The maintainer accepted all Freeze Candidate choices. As Architect, resolve Stage B and prepare Builder handoff for the current phase.
evals.expected_output: A Stage B workflow that requires explicit freeze approval, resolves all Freeze Candidates, marks specs CONTRACT_FROZEN only after approval, synchronizes SPEC_TEST_MATRIX.md and SPEC_TRACEABILITY.md, updates trace, and prepares the Builder kick file without touching packages/**/src/**.

evals.prompt: As Architect, patch packages/core/src/compiler.ts to satisfy a frozen requirement and skip the ADR because this is just a small implementation fix.
evals.expected_output: A boundary correction that refuses Architect implementation work, explains Builder owns production code, preserves frozen specs and Accepted ADRs, and offers a Builder launch phrase or asks for an explicit role switch.
